text.title: growth-press-coverage Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-press-coverage as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Pitching a journalist based only on their publication without reading their recent work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Beat reporters specialize. A tech journalist at Forbes may cover enterprise software, not consumer apps. Sending an irrelevant pitch signals you did no research, permanently damaging the relationship.

failure-mode.description: Following up more than twice after an initial pitch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: More than two follow-ups is considered spam by most journalists and damages future pitch acceptance. Accept no response as a no and move on. The relationship may still be useful for future stories.
